items.title: Stock Radar: City Union Bank stock hits fresh record high in February; time to buy or book profits?
items.description: City Union Bank stock is showing strong upward momentum. Experts predict the rally will continue, with a potential target of Rs 321. The stock has broken out of a long-term bullish pattern and is trading above key moving averages. This indicates a positive outlook for the banking stock in the coming weeks. Traders can consider buying on dips.
